message:
feat(engine): external package exports map resolution in module resolver

Add Node-style package exports map support to DeterministicModuleResolver,
enabling resolution of bare specifiers through structured condition-based
export targets rather than only direct module registration.

New types and capabilities:
- ExternalPackageDefinition: package metadata with named exports map
- ExternalPackageExportTarget: condition_targets (import/require/default)
  plus fallback_target
- register_external_package(): registers a package with normalized name
  and export keys
- resolve_external_package_candidate(): resolves specifiers through the
  exports map with condition priority ordering

Resolution semantics:
- Exact export key match takes priority over wildcard patterns
- Wildcard exports (e.g. "./*") support single-star capture/replacement
- Condition ordering: import→default for ESM, require→default for CJS
- Fallback target used when no condition matches
- Specificity-based tiebreaking for competing wildcard patterns

Internal helpers: parse_package_specifier (scoped/unscoped),
capture_single_wildcard, apply_wildcard_capture, pattern_specificity,
normalize_registered_package_name, normalize_package_export_key,
resolve_package_export_target, resolve_package_export_path

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
